title: Touhou Dev Server Pack
description: TouhouDevServer modpack, 1.20.1 with some additional generation mods configured around Create
body:
For setting up servers with the october version of the Touhou Game Dev server's community pack :)

The main setup for this pack is:

Terralith for fresh overworld
BetterX for fresh Nether and End dimensions
Sodium/Indium for performance and Iris shader support

Deeper and Darker as Deep Dark enhancement

Create fork to fix rendering issues across versions

Proximity Voice via simple voice chat

Additional content via Artifacts, Towns and Towers, and Tidal Towns

Minor UI mods of Better F3 and WTHIT

Additional compatibility mods to allow for Fresh Animations without the use of Optifine
